sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24904" key="diakarte/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διακαρτέρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">endurance, perseverance,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
